elements.name: House Bonisagus
elements.summary: Masters of Magic Theory and Hermetic research; Trianomae politicians hold the Order together.
elements.wants: Advance magic and preserve the Order's unity.
elements.as_character: A brilliant researcher or a consummate Order politician.
elements.as_thread: A Bonisagus seeks a rare text, an apprentice, or a vote.

elements.name: House Bjornaer
elements.summary: Beast-souled magi, each with a personal heartbeast animal form.
elements.wants: Understand the bestial/animal nature; guard the wild.
elements.as_character: An insular, primal magus wary of outsiders.
elements.as_thread: A Bjornaer rite or a wild place needs defending.

elements.name: House Criamon
elements.summary: Body-marked mystics pursuing 'the Enigma'; disdain raw power.
elements.wants: Mystical understanding (freeing souls, the nature of time).
elements.as_character: A cryptic seer who speaks in riddles and alien logic.
elements.as_thread: A Criamon riddle or vision draws the covenant into a Mystery.

elements.name: House Ex Miscellanea
elements.summary: Vast, disorganized House of hedge traditions; accepts almost any Gifted wizard.
elements.wants: A home for the unaligned and outsider.
elements.as_character: A half-Hermetic wizard of an obscure tradition.
elements.as_thread: A strange hedge-tradition power complicates Hermetic law.

elements.name: House Flambeau
elements.summary: Combat magi of fire and destruction; the Order's warriors, with an honour strand.
elements.wants: Struggle and the honourable application of force.
elements.as_character: A bold, aggressive fire-magus, sometimes chivalrous.
elements.as_thread: A Flambeau feud, crusade, or Wizard's War looms.

elements.name: House Guernicus (Quaesitores)
elements.summary: The Order's lawgivers; their Quaesitores investigate crimes against the Code.
elements.wants: The Code enforced and the Order preserved.
elements.as_character: A stern investigator-judge empowered by the Tribunal.
elements.as_thread: A Quaesitor investigates a (suspected) breach of the Code.

elements.name: House Jerbiton
elements.summary: Magi of art, civilization, and the mundane world; brokers with nobility and Church.
elements.wants: Heal the rift between magi and humanity; defend civilization.
elements.as_character: A cultured ambassador or aesthete, often Gentle-Gifted.
elements.as_thread: A Jerbiton needs help with a mundane patron or a work of art.

elements.name: House Mercere
elements.summary: The messengers; Gifted and unGifted Redcaps who carry news and bind the Order.
elements.as_thread: A Redcap brings urgent news, a summons, or a sensitive package.

elements.name: House Merinita
elements.summary: Faerie-bound magi who study and defend the fae; seek answers in Arcadia.
elements.wants: Study and defend faeries; walk the bounds of Arcadia.
elements.as_character: A strange magus as uncanny as the fae they study.
elements.as_thread: A Merinita's faerie pact or quest entangles the covenant.

elements.name: House Tremere
elements.summary: Disciplined strategists who prize hierarchy and planning; invented Certámen.
elements.wants: Order, control, and the effective execution of House plans.
elements.as_character: A methodical magus who respects hierarchy and the long game.
elements.as_thread: Tremere maneuvering puts the covenant in a larger scheme.

elements.name: House Tytalus
elements.summary: Masters of every kind of conflict; thrive on struggle; once tainted by diabolism, since purged.
elements.wants: Perpetual contest; to test others' strengths.
elements.as_character: A provocative magus who embraces challenge for its own sake.
elements.as_thread: A Tytalus picks a contest of wits, law, or magic with the covenant.

elements.name: House Verditius
elements.summary: Unmatched crafters of enchanted items; proud, vendetta-prone; bound to casting tools.
elements.wants: Craft the finest items and prove superiority.
elements.as_character: A proud enchanter selling devices, nursing a long vendetta.
elements.as_thread: A Verditius item, contest, or feud is on offer or in play.
